fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the entry.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of capacity entry.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the entry.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the entry.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of this entry, in base units of measure.

fields.name: Invoiced Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units of the item on the line that have been invoiced. The quantity is expressed in base units of measure.

fields.name: SIFT Bucket No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies an automatically generated number that is used by the system to enable better concurrency.

fields.name: Cap. Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure code for the capacity usage.

fields.name: Qty. per Cap. Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the quantity per capacity unit of measure.
The program copies the quantity per capacity unit of measure from the Qty. per Cap. Unit of Measure field on the item journal line.
You cannot change the quantity per capacity unit of measure because the capacity ledger entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Completely Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the entry has been fully invoiced or if more posted invoices are expected.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the unit of measure code.
The program copies the code from the Unit of Measure Code field on the item journal line.
You cannot change the code because the capacity ledger entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the quantity per unit of measure.
The program copies the quantity per unit of measure from the Qty. per Unit of Measure field on the item journal line.
You cannot change the quantity per unit of measure because the capacity ledger entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the document date, which need not necessarily be the same as the posting date.
The program copies the document date from the Document Date field on the item journal line.
You cannot change the document date because the capacity ledger entry has already been posted.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the external document number.
The program copies the external document number from the External Document No. field on the item journal line.
You cannot change the external document number because the capacity ledger entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Direct Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the direct cost in LCY of the quantity posting.

fields.name: Overhead Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the overhead cost in LCY of the quantity posting.

fields.name: Direct Cost (ACY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the direct cost in the additional reporting currency.

fields.name: Overhead Cost (ACY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the overhead cost in the additional reporting currency.

fields.name: Subcontracting
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the capacity ledger entry is from a subcontractor.

fields.name: Reversed
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the entry has been part of a reverse transaction.

fields.name: Reversed by Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the correcting entry that replaced the original entry in the reverse transaction.

fields.name: Reversed Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the original entry that was undone by the reverse transaction.

fields.name: Order Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies which type of order the entry was created in.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the order that created the entry.

fields.name: Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the order that created the entry.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 3 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 3, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 4 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 4, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 5 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 5, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 6 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 6, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 7 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 7, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 8 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 8, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.
